title: Sample Preparation Focusing on Plant Omics.
author_string: Galazzi, Rodrigo Moretto, de Jesus, Jemmyson Romário, Arruda, Marco Aurélio Zezzi
journal_full: Advances in experimental medicine and biology
abstract: Because of strong impact of omics in many fields, and the complexity of the samples when focusing on areas such as genomics, (metallo)proteomics, metabolomics, among others, it is easy to rationalize the great importance that sample preparation has for achieving reliable results, mainly considering plant science. Then, this chapter points out applications of the sample preparation focusing on such areas, and a diversity of strategies, techniques, and procedures is highlighted and commented.
